notes: Czechia have no injuries or suspensions and Koubek is expected to avoid sweeping changes from the South Korea defeat, sticking with his 3-4-2-1. South Africa are severely depleted: Themba Zwane is banned for 3 matches (red card vs Mexico) and Sphephelo Sithole serves a 1-match suspension, forcing Thalente Mbatha into midfield.
